display: flex; flex-direction: row; min-width: 180px; max-width: 320px; background: var(--reactodia-paper-bg); border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid var(--reactodia-paper-border, #d1d5db); overflow: hidden; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 1px 3px; font-size: 12px; font-family: inherit; cursor: default; user-select: none;

div.title: http://example.com/scene-ontology#Character
div.style: padding: 3px 8px 0px; font-size: 10px; color: var(--reactodia-paper-fg-muted, #6b7280); overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 8px;

flex-shrink: 0; width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 4px; background: rgb(199, 178, 254); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px;

span.title: http://example.com/scene-ontology#vera
span.style: flex: 1 1 0%; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; color: var(--reactodia-paper-fg);

div.style: border-top: 1px solid var(--reactodia-paper-border, #e5e7eb); padding: 6px 8px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; max-height: 280px; overflow-y: auto;
